supersession_reason: tools_on_stream and image_plus_tools both flipped from SAW_NO to PASS after Sourcegraph upgraded to api-version=9. The April baseline drove BrainRouter.twoStepWorkaround; this baseline justifies its removal.

outcomes.name: tools_on_stream
outcomes.description: POST /.api/completions/stream with `tools` field (no image) on api-version=9
notes: Gateway forwards tool_use frames on api-version=9
Markers observed: tool_use, tool_call, tool_calls, delta_tool_calls
SUPERSEDES 2026-04-22 baseline (tools were silently dropped at api-version=8)

outcomes.name: image_plus_tools
outcomes.description: POST /.api/completions/stream with image + tools combined, api-version=9
notes: Image + tools in same turn now works — no two-step workaround needed

outcomes.name: tools_on_public_chat_completions
outcomes.description: POST /.api/llm/chat/completions with `tools` field — regression check (this still works)
notes: Not re-probed in 2026-05-05 — kept from 2026-04-22 baseline
Public chat/completions still honours tools as before
